calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-02-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
(No objections to the proposed change of name were made on July 1, 2004. At Mr. James Bordelon's request, this matter is heard on July 2, 2004 at 09:00 a.m.)
Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Petitioner: Lewie Alan Gillian, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Lewis Alan Gillian.
Decree signed in open court.
